results.title: Moverse - Studio-grade markerless MoCap for anyone, anywhere!
results.content:
At Moverse, we are dedicated to transforming traditional animation workflows through innovative markerless motion capture and AI-driven 3D animation services. Founded by a team of passionate engineers and visionaries in Thessaloniki, Greece, Moverse is committed to making high-quality 3D animation and motion capture productions more accessible and efficient for creators and game developers around the world. At Moverse, our goal is to accelerate the process and workflows of 3D animation and motion capture by providing tools that are not only powerful but also accessible to animators and studios of all sizes. By integrating the latest advancements in AI and machine learning, we deliver cost-effective, scalable solutions that automate tedious processes, freeing up creative professionals to [...] ## Similar Companies
Omilia (Software Development):  (Larnaca, Larnaca); Greeks in AI (Research Services):  (N/A); Movesense (Medical Device):  (Vantaa, Uusimaa); Winimo (Software Development):  (N/A); EVO Human Performance (Spectator Sports):  (Moschato-Tavros, Attica); IMVERSE (Software Development):  (N/A); Brainbox Technology (IT Services and IT Consulting):  (N/A); Rerun (Software Development):  (Stockholm, Sweden); eVplus (Motor Vehicle Manufacturing):  (N/A); Rhoé (Information Technology & Services):  (Thessaloniki, Macedonia) [...] tedious processes, freeing up creative professionals to focus on what they do best — creating. Moverse is committed to accelerating these essential but time-consuming tasks, enabling a surge of innovation and creativity in 3D animation. We offer: - Real-Time Markerless MoCap: Capture motion without physical markers, using sophisticated AI algorithms to ensure precision and ease. - Generative AI: Leveraging Generative AI to automate and enhance both mocap and animation processes, creating dynamic, lifelike animations that save time and reduce production costs. - Cloud-Based Integration: Access and manage your animation assets from anywhere, facilitated by our secure, scalable Moverse Portal.

## Unlocking motion across industries

Professional using XR headset with high-fidelity motion capture tracking

### XR

Empower your immersive virtual worlds with high-fidelity motion. Ideal for real-time applications, interactive experiences, and live performances. [...] ### Scalability

Start low with lean 4-camera setup, and scale it higher to 16+ cameras for increased quality, larger volumes and higher performer counts.

### Velocity

Eliminate calibration and suit-up time. With a unified workflow, Moverse Capture is the fastest end-to-end path from physical performance to digital asset.

## See for yourself.

Observe the quality: No markers, No suits. No jitter. Solid contacts. Smooth motion. Visit our explore page to see for yourself how Moverse captures natural and expressive motion capture with Moverse and a few standard cameras.

Try Now!   Playground

Our Belief 

## Flexible capture. Seamless workflows.

We build around the idea that MoCap should be simple. Performers at the front, technology at the back, and minimal layers in between.

Less process. More creation. Faster insights.

### Quality

Moverse Capture delivers production-ready, high-fidelity motion capture data without the complexity and overhead of legacy systems.

### Robustness

Technology breaks when in contact with the real world. Moverse engineers it to hold, maintaining tracking integrity where others struggle.

### Scalability
